question:
Study the following information carefully and

answer the questions given beside:

In a certain code language,

“every cities build nation” is coded as “bh ma ju

lo”

“build range part nation” is coded as “ ga bh nu

ju”

“try every making part” is coded as “ va de ma

nu”

“build cities peace making” is coded as “ bu ju de

lo”

How will "build every" be coded in the language?

answer the questions given beside:

lo”

ju”

lo”

nation - bh

peace - bu

question:
Study the following information carefully and

answer the questions given beside:

In a certain code language,

“now order from food” is coded as “oc ms na lq”

“pending medical from also” is coded as “bo vm

zg na”

“center pending being now” is coded as “qe lq zg

ho”

“order pending equality also” is coded as “yu bo

zg ms”

If ‘equality center close’ is written as ‘cc yu ho’

then what would be the code of ‘close medical

order’?

ho”

order’?
explanation:

now - lq

order - ms

food - oc

pending - zg

also - bo

medical - vm

center/being - ho/qe

equality - yu

question:
Study the following arrangement carefully and

answer the questions given below. One of the

codes in the underlined statement is incorrect.

In a certain coded language some statements

are coded as follows:

TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517

822

STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590

517 407

CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded

as 407 591 ??? 822 667

BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as

591 719 ]]] 407 822

Which among the following is the incorrect code

in the underlined statement?
question_html:
Study the following arrangement carefully and

answer the questions given below. One of the

codes in the underlined statement is incorrect.

In a certain coded language some statements

are coded as follows:

TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517

822

STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590

517 407

CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded

as 407 591 ??? 822 667

BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as

591 719 ]]] 407 822

Which among the following is the incorrect code

in the underlined statement?
questionHtml:
Study the following arrangement carefully and

answer the questions given below. One of the

codes in the underlined statement is incorrect.

In a certain coded language some statements

are coded as follows:

TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517

822

STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590

517 407

CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded

as 407 591 ??? 822 667

BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as

591 719 ]]] 407 822

Which among the following is the incorrect code

in the underlined statement?
explanation:
It is given that,

TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517

822 ..................................(I)

STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590

517 407 ................................(II)

CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded

as 407 591 ??? 822 667........(III)

BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as

591 719 ]]] 407 822.............(IV)

From I and II, BOX == 517.

From II, III and IV, STAND == 407.

From I, III and IV, CHAIR == 822.

From I and IV, TABLE == 719.

From I, DESK == 448.

From III and IV, BOARD == 591.

From IV, DECK == ]]]

From II, STOOL SOFA == 198 590 (Here, one of

the codes is incorrect.)

From III, STOOL COVER == ??? 667

Here, either 590 or 198 is the incorrect code.

822
explanation:
It is given that,

TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517

822 ..................................(I)

STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590

517 407 ................................(II)

CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded

as 407 591 ??? 822 667........(III)

BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as

591 719 ]]] 407 822.............(IV)

From I and II, BOX == 517.

From II, III and IV, STAND == 407.

From I, III and IV, CHAIR == 822.

From I and IV, TABLE == 719.

From I, DESK == 448.

From III and IV, BOARD == 591.

From IV, DECK == ]]]

From II, STOOL SOFA == 198 590 (Here, one of

the codes is incorrect.)

From III, STOOL COVER == ??? 667

Here, '728' is the only code which can replace

']]]''. As,

a) 407 == STAND

b) 822 == CHAIR

c) 448 == DESK

d) 517 == BOX
